calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Off Calendar

Quiet Title
Off Calendar May-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge.
Scott M. McLeod, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Patricia Montague, as Trustee of the Patricia Montague Family Trust of 2004 and as Trustee of the Morgan Montague Testamentary Trust, and Morgan L. Montague, as Trustee of the Morgan Montague Testamentary Trust.
Plaintiff's Witness: Patricia Montague was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Henry Hofmann and Emma B. Hofmann as follows:
Right to the property in San Francisco, CA. described as Lot A on map of Lyon & Hoag's Subdivision of Ashbury Terrace.
(See scanned document for details of the judgment and of the subject property.)
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2007 Continued To Jun-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
